meaning: n.结构,体格vt.构成,设计,制定,使适合,陷害vi.<英方>有成功希望n.帧,画面,框架
examples: The frame is made of steel.
The frame is made of metal.
The window frame had rotted away completely.
The V8 charges up a 24kWh battery pack, situated between the rear frame rails.
Back in 1979 most stock dollars flowed from institutions whose time frame is three to five years.
